parties.name: JOHNSON, SHELIKA 68 BLYTHEDALE AVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This is the second petition that was filed by Shelika Johnson. The first petition went off calendar when Ms. Johnson failed to appear at an Order to Appear hearing. Ms. Johnson did appear at the May 7, 2012 Order to Appear hearing on the second petition where she stated that she was going to do publication. Nothing has been done. Therefore, the Petition for Letters of Administration was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Continued To Jun-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shelika Johnson in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Ms. Johnson that Proof of Publication was required/needed, discussed use of Probate Code 13100 Declaration and also advised her that granting of the Waiver of Court Fees was incorrect. Furthermore, the Court informed Ms. Johnson that it is revoking the Order Granting Waiver of Fees prior to any distribution order, that she is required to keep track of and account for all fees incurred, and that those fees will be deducted from her final distribution. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to June 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of publication.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shelika Johnson in Propria Persona.

The matters were continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court recommends that Ms. Johnson seek the assistance of an Attorney.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner Shelika Johnson in Pro Per to appear on December 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address issues with respect to the petition.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
